subcodes.first_line: Not every heart is capable of acting as a repository for divine love. For not every soul is suited for growing wondrous herbs
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر قلبی قابل ودیعه حب الهیه نبوده و نخواهد بود چنانچه هر ارضی لایق انبات
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @differences in human capacity, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @man's distinction from the animal, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight
